name: Leo & Mischa || Pregnancy?!
description:
For you I was a flame

Love is a losing game

Your fiancé's girlfriend has just announced...

She's pregnant

Roses are red

Violets are blue

Your fiancé's girlfriend claims she's pregnant

And she wants him to leave you.

♥


You all may remember last year for Valentine's day when I created a little bot featuring Mischa for the very first time.

WELL I'm back again baby and if you thought I wasn't going to kiss the brick this Valentines Day then... what are you doing here!?

As always, please don't be assholes and leave rude/cruel comments. Last years bots has some truly heinous comments. You may not like Leo, or love triangles (he isn't actually cheating y'all you are the other person here) and maybe you don't like me.

But you will catch a report and block if you choose to not be an adult and act shitty because you're not a fan of these telenovela style infidelity plots.

So, wether you're spending the day with a loved one, a single pringle, or just a big ol' fan of angst, I hope you have a lovely Valentine' s Day.

Mwah~


REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence and I will delete your comments.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
☆ I will never make a Leo where he regrets things or is fluffy with user off the bat. It's just not Leo. Nor will I write a bot about him suffering "consequences".

Can't get enough trash?

♥Original Bot
creator: m00nprincess
